extDescription.message: Visual history tracker: Domain stats, interactive charts, and CSV export.

blacklistLabel.message: Domain blacklist (hide history from these domains)

optionsFeatDomains.message: Groups browsing history by root domain; site favicon; click a site to expand its URL list and visit details.

optionsFeatStats.message: Per-site visit count, distinct page count, last visit time, and a bar showing share of total visits in the current filter.

optionsFeatSort.message: Sort the list by most recent visit or by total visit count.

optionsFeatFilter.message: Time filters: All, Today, Week, Month (opens on Today by default).

optionsFeatCalendar.message: Calendar to pick any single day; a date badge shows an active day filter—click the badge to clear and return to range filters.

optionsFeatViews.message: Switch between the History list and the Statistics view (charts) from the header control.

optionsFeatTrend.message: Visit trend bar chart for the last 7 days (by day).

optionsFeatHour.message: Visit distribution by hour (0–23) as a smooth curve with gradient fill, based on the current filter.

optionsFeatCategory.message: Visit share by website category as a pie chart; categories are inferred from domain; legend and slices highlight together on hover.

optionsFeatSearch.message: Search within titles, URLs, and domains for the current time range.

optionsFeatExport.message: Export the current filtered list to CSV (UTF-8 with BOM): site title, domain, visits, pages, last visit, earliest visit among URLs.

optionsFeatPrivacy.message: Privacy settings: domain blacklist; suggestions from your history while typing; remove one site’s history for all its URLs.

optionsFeatTheme.message: Light / dark theme. Interface language is saved in extension storage (many languages available).

optionsFeatFooter.message: Footer: link to this extension page, GitHub repository, back-to-top when the list is scrolled; in developer-loaded builds, an extra language menu may appear.

dashPermHistory.message: history — Read your browsing history to build statistics; you can delete a site's history from the UI when you choose.

dashPermStorage.message: storage — Store your preferences on this device only (theme, language, blacklist, etc.).

dashPermFavicon.message: favicon — Load site icons from the browser's built-in favicon service for the site list.

dashPermDownloads.message: downloads — Save CSV files when you use Export.

dashAboutLicenseBody.message: Source code is available on GitHub. Use, modification, and distribution follow the license file in that repository. This extension is not affiliated with Google LLC.

trendChartEmpty.message: No visits in this time range. Try another filter or "All".

hourChartEmpty.message: Hour distribution based on filtered visits

dashHourTitleByClock.message: Visits by clock hour in range (0–23)
